name: KFC Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover chicken with mixture of water and salt. Chill in bowl for at least 1 hour.
2. Whisk together herbs, onion powder, seasoned salt, instant chicken broth, and pepper in a blender.
3. Combine the blended mixture with the flour mixture while still wet until the chicken is thoroughly coated with flour.
4. Heat enough shortening or salad oil in a large skillet to reach a depth of 1 inch. Heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Fry chicken pieces, turning once, for 5 minutes on each side.
6. Lift the chicken from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
7. When the chicken is fried, remove it from the skillet and let the fat drain out.
8. Add one cup of chicken broth to the skillet, return the chicken pieces, and cover. Cook for 15 minutes or until fork-tender.
This recipe is entitled "Marie Walsh's Kentucky Fried Chicken". I copied it out of a magazine several years ago and have used it often. WALLACE LEMAL (CGVH43A) (wrv)
